message:
fix: accept bypass permissions warning in crew start and fix cycle bindings

Crew sessions were getting stuck on the "Bypass Permissions mode" dialog
because crew.Manager.Start() never called AcceptBypassPermissionsWarning,
unlike every other role (polecat, deacon, daemon, sling).

Crew session cycling (C-b n/p) was broken with multiple tmux clients
because SetCycleBindings() did not pass --client #{client_tty} to the
run-shell command. Without it, switch-client targets the wrong client.

The cycling fix also kept reverting because the isGTBinding guard
prevented self-correction of stale bindings. Replaced with
isGTBindingWithClient that only skips when --client is already present.

Also fixes pre-existing build error: missing os/exec import in
polecat/manager.go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
